meta.title: Mirja Tschakarov – Frontend Developer

meta.keywords: SVG skills chart, frontend developer, webdesign

home.title: Frontend Development and Webdesign
home.description: I am Mirja, Frontend Developer with over 10 years of experience in web development, UI/UX design, and data-driven applications. Specialized in React, TypeScript, and scalable frontend architectures.

tasks.desc: Leading frontend development of a web application that supports data scientists in managing and analyzing wind energy projects
tasks.0: Selection and implementation of technical setups and responsibility for architectural decisions for a scalable frontend, including building a design system and test workflows
tasks.1: Ensuring accessibility (WCAG), responsiveness, and cross-browser compatibility
tasks.2: Implementation of modern frontend patterns (e.g., Hooks, Code Splitting) to improve performance and maintainability
tasks.3: Planning and implementation of new features in close coordination with backend team and data scientists (API design, data models, UX optimization)
tasks.4: Active participation and moderation of sprint planning and refinements in the agile development process
tasks.5: Onboarding, coaching, and mentoring of junior and mid-level developers

tasks.desc: Development of web applications for machine learning processes and wind farm project planning based on geo and location data
tasks.0: Conceptualization, introduction, and maintenance of a component-based design system as well as establishing automated tests to ensure code quality
tasks.1: Improving usability through redesign of UI components
tasks.2: Development of new features and improvement of existing functions
tasks.3: Performance optimization through refactoring existing components and regular code reviews
tasks.4: State management with React Context for modular, maintainable component architectures
tasks.5: Introduction of coding standards, linting, Prettier, and TypeScript strict mode for consistent code quality
tasks.6: Participation in sprint planning, refinements, and retrospectives in the agile development process

offensichtbar.title: Frontend Developer and Webdesigner

tasks.0: Conceptualization, design, and implementation of interactive learning platforms and modules, web applications, games, and corporate websites
tasks.1: Client consulting, project management, and long-term support
tasks.2: Implementation of React and WordPress-based frontends

offensichtbar.clients: Clients (among others): Dior (LVMH) • Shiseido • NORDMETALL-Stiftung • Wärme Hamburg (via compactteam)
